license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q3xdypn
title: Gut_All Cells_Human
author: Kylie James

steps_raw.instruction: Receive samples. Take about 4mm^2 sample for OCT
Wash samples twice with HBSS medium. In petri dish, mince sample into 0.5cm pieces.

Incubate the samples in 2ml HBSS medium containing 1.07 Wunsch units/ml (2.14wu) Liberase DH (Roche Applied Science, Germany) and 70 U/ml hyaluronidase (Calbiochem/Merck, Germany) for 45 min at 37C on a shaking platform at 600 rpm.
Homogenise the sample every 15 min the solution by pipetting up and down with a 1ml pipette for 1 min.
Pass cells through a 40mM sieve. Spin them down at 300 g at 4C for 10 min.
Resuspended in 300ml PBS buffer containing 100 IU/ml DNAse II (Sigma Aldrich, Missouri, USA).
Proceed with bead enrichment as per manufacturers protocols. Typically this will be a Miltenyi CD45+ enrichment.
Count cells and dilute to the desired concentration with PBS.
Load cells (aim for 5000/run) on to the 10X.
